response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack/web engineer with 15+ years of experience, but his background is almost entirely in web, mobile, and backend product development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, PHP). The role requires principal-level expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in the resume. His closest relevant work (low-latency DLang services, C/C++ at National Instruments, an audio DSP thesis) is far from silicon-level performance architecture, and there is no deep-learning workload experience at all.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience, meeting the BS + 8 years bar
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, millions of requests/sec in DLang)
Some systems-level C/C++ experience (NI LabWindows/CVI components, audio wave-field synthesis thesis)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or hardware-software co-design experience
No AI/deep-learning workload, GPU architecture, or accelerator optimization background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product engineering, not principal-level performance architecture

key_factors.factor: No AI/DL or GPU workload background
Strong general engineering tenure and systems fundamentals
